pageDesc.default: Apartments, restaurants, doctors, schools and transport — everything you need abroad in one place. Verified providers, real reviews.
pageDesc.apartments: Apartments for rent abroad — long-term and short-stay. Real photos, tenant reviews, direct contact with landlords.
pageDesc.villas: Villas for rent abroad. Pools, sea views, for families and groups. Verified owners.
pageDesc.services: Useful services for life abroad: legal help, delivery, language courses, medical care and more.
pageDesc.excursions: Excursions and tours abroad from local guides. Easy to find and book directly.
pageDesc.transport: Car rental, transfers and transport services abroad. No middlemen.
pageDesc.food: Restaurants, cafes and food delivery abroad. Places recommended by expats who live there.
pageDesc.healthcare: Doctors, dentists and clinics abroad. Find a specialist near you.
pageDesc.education: Language schools, kindergartens and courses abroad. For children and adults.

provider.bothLanguagesRequired: Please fill in both English and Russian
provider.createListingHint: Fill in the details below. Your listing will be reviewed before publishing.
provider.editListingHint: Changes will be sent for admin review before going live.
provider.listingAwaitingApproval: Your listing is awaiting admin approval.
provider.listingUpdatedApproval: Your changes have been submitted for review.
provider.titleEnPlaceholder: e.g. Modern studio near the beach
provider.isShortTermAvailableHint: The listing will also appear when visitors filter by short-term rentals.
provider.shortTermDisclaimer: Short-term rental means daily or weekly rental — guests pay per night or per week. Choose this type if you rent out your property for short stays (tourists, business trips, etc.).
provider.shortTermRentDisclaimer: Long-term rental means monthly rental — tenants pay per month for extended stays (relocation, work, study). Enable the option below if the property can also be rented short-term.
